text: Deletion: Fattal Hotels states it will not make an offer after opposition from Euro Plaza Holdings (which holds 33%).
On 31 May 2026 PPHE had received an indicative proposal from another interested party which is being assessed.
Extension of PUSU deadline to 2 July 2026.
Recommended final cash offer by EQT at £60 per share. The offer will be a scheme of arrangement.
